title: Service entrypoint contract

commands.summary: Final S01 closeout gate rerun after evidence creation

commands.command: claude --add-dir /tmp --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode bypassPermissions --no-session-persistence --tools Read --allowedTools Read --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit,Grep,Glob --output-format stream-json --include-partial-messages --verbose -p <review prompt>
commands.summary: Single valid completed read-only S01 Claude review completed against /tmp/lfos-rp00-p02-m05-s01-review-packet.diff.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

All commands are local validation, parser, test, Claude read-only review, or git whitespace checks; none execute service logic, create runtime routes, evaluate runtime permission, call an AuthZ evaluator, run a permission engine, apply security trimming, append audit ledgers, write audit events, write databases, write storage, persist product state, mutate entity registries, replace human approval, or create runtime product behavior.
Pre-closeout npm run rp00:control-plane:validate failed only because S01 evidence files were intentionally not created yet; this command is rerun after evidence creation as the final gate.

Claude C00 valid completed review ran once using claude-opus-4-8 effort=max read-only packet review. Claude rated the S01 implementation PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with no P0/P1/P2 findings. The single P3 unit-level negative-test coverage finding was fixed before final production_ready.

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review required before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval is not replaced or synthesized by this deterministic synthetic Permission And Audit Binding service entrypoint contract because no sensitive production mutation, client-facing output, external sharing, finance action, real data operation, runtime execution, permission engine execution, AuthZ evaluation, security trimming execution, audit write, storage write, database write, or product-state write occurs.
evidence_summary.permission_audit_binding_boundary: S01 records a metadata-only Permission And Audit Binding service entrypoint contract after the S14 Claude review required-routing closeout, binds eight permission/audit contexts, fails closed at validator/fixture/contract drift boundaries, keeps RP00.P02.M05 open, and hands off to RP00.P02.M05.S02.
